# PDFShuffl

> PDFShuffl is a free, fast, privacy-friendly suite of browser-based PDF tools. Convert, edit, compress, merge, split, sign and organise PDF files online from any device, with no installation or signup required.

PDFShuffl runs entirely in the browser. Files are processed securely and are not shared. The service is available worldwide, including geo-targeted landing pages for major countries and cities, and a growing library of in-depth guides written by the Lexigenz Authors editorial desk.

## What you can do

- Convert documents into PDF from Word, LibreOffice, PowerPoint, Excel, CSV, plain text, HTML and images.
- Convert PDF back into editable Word, LibreOffice, HTML, CSV and plain text.
- Compress, merge, split, crop, rotate and reorganise PDF files.
- Sign PDFs, sign locked PDFs and send signing requests to other people.
- Protect, unlock and secure PDF documents with passwords and permissions.
- Learn how every tool works through the Playbook course and the article library.

## Core tools

- [PDF Converter](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): PDF Converter online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to Word](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to Word online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert Word to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert Word to PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to Excel](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to Excel online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert Excel to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert Excel to PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to JPG](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to JPG online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert JPG to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert JPG to PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to PNG](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to PNG online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to PowerPoint](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to PowerPoint online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PowerPoint to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PowerPoint to PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Compress PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Compress PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Merge PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Merge PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Split PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Split PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Edit PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Edit PDF online, free, secure, no signup.
- [Sign PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Sign PDF online, free, secure, no signup.

## Learning library

### Office to PDF

- [Word to PDF: The Complete Guide to Converting Documents Without Losing Formatting](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/word-to-pdf-the-complete-guide-to-converting-documents-without-losing-formatting)
- [How to Convert Excel Spreadsheets to PDF for Clean, Print-Ready Reports](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/how-to-convert-excel-spreadsheets-to-pdf-for-clean-print-ready-reports)
- [PowerPoint to PDF: Sharing Presentations That Look Right Everywhere](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/powerpoint-to-pdf-sharing-presentations-that-look-right-everywhere)
- [CSV to PDF: Turning Raw Data Exports into Readable Documents](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/csv-to-pdf-turning-raw-data-exports-into-readable-documents)
- [LibreOffice to PDF: A Practical Guide for Open-Source Document Workflows](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/libreoffice-to-pdf-a-practical-guide-for-open-source-document-workflows)
- [TXT to PDF: Making Plain Text Look Professional](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/txt-to-pdf-making-plain-text-look-professional)
- [Why Converting Office Files to PDF Protects Your Formatting and Your Brand](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/why-converting-office-files-to-pdf-protects-your-formatting-and-your-brand)
- [Batch Converting Office Documents to PDF: Workflows That Save Hours](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/batch-converting-office-documents-to-pdf-workflows-that-save-hours)
- [Merge Office Documents to PDF: Combining Word, Excel and PowerPoint Into One File](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/merge-office-documents-to-pdf-combining-word-excel-and-powerpoint-into-one-file)
- [Google Docs to PDF: Exporting Docs and Sheets Without Surprises](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/google-docs-to-pdf-exporting-docs-and-sheets-without-surprises)
- [Preserve Hyperlinks in PDF: Keeping Links and Bookmarks Alive on Conversion](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/preserve-hyperlinks-in-pdf-keeping-links-and-bookmarks-alive-on-conversion)
- [Accessible PDF: Creating Tagged, Inclusive Documents From Office Files](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/accessible-pdf-creating-tagged-inclusive-documents-from-office-files)
- [Spreadsheet Charts to PDF: Converting Graphs and Dashboards Cleanly](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/spreadsheet-charts-to-pdf-converting-graphs-and-dashboards-cleanly)
- [PDF Fonts: Typography Tricks for Professional Documents From Office Files](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-fonts-typography-tricks-for-professional-documents-from-office-files)
- [Office Templates to PDF: Turning Invoices, Letterheads and Certificates Into Reusable Files](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/office-templates-to-pdf-turning-invoices-letterheads-and-certificates-into-reusable-files)
- [Page Setup for PDF: Getting Margins, Orientation and Print Areas Right First](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/page-setup-for-pdf-getting-margins-orientation-and-print-areas-right-first)
- [PDF/A for Archiving: Storing Office Documents for the Long Term](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-a-for-archiving-storing-office-documents-for-the-long-term)

### PDF to Editable Formats

- [PDF to Word: How to Convert PDFs into Editable Documents the Right Way](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-word-how-to-convert-pdfs-into-editable-documents-the-right-way)
- [PDF to CSV: Extracting Tables and Data from PDFs Without Retyping](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-csv-extracting-tables-and-data-from-pdfs-without-retyping)
- [PDF to HTML: Publishing PDF Content on the Web](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-html-publishing-pdf-content-on-the-web)
- [PDF to TXT: Extracting Clean, Plain Text from Any PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-txt-extracting-clean-plain-text-from-any-pdf)
- [PDF to LibreOffice: Editing PDFs in Free, Open-Source Software](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-libreoffice-editing-pdfs-in-free-open-source-software)
- [Making Flat and Scanned PDFs Editable Again](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/making-flat-and-scanned-pdfs-editable-again)
- [When to Convert a PDF Back to an Editable Format, and When Not To](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/when-to-convert-a-pdf-back-to-an-editable-format-and-when-not-to)
- [OCR for PDFs: How to Turn Scanned Pages into Searchable, Editable Text](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/ocr-for-pdfs-how-to-turn-scanned-pages-into-searchable-editable-text)
- [PDF to Excel: Rebuilding Working Spreadsheets from PDF Tables](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-excel-rebuilding-working-spreadsheets-from-pdf-tables)
- [Editable PDF Forms: How to Fix, Edit and Make a PDF Fillable](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/editable-pdf-forms-how-to-fix-edit-and-make-a-pdf-fillable)
- [PDF to Presentation: Reusing Document Content in Slides Without Starting Over](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-presentation-reusing-document-content-in-slides-without-starting-over)
- [Extract Images from a PDF Without Losing Quality](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/extract-images-from-a-pdf-without-losing-quality)
- [How to Copy Text from a PDF the Right Way](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/how-to-copy-text-from-a-pdf-the-right-way)
- [Reflowing PDFs: Making Fixed Pages Work on Phones and for Accessibility](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/reflowing-pdfs-making-fixed-pages-work-on-phones-and-for-accessibility)
- [PDF to Markdown: Converting Documents into Clean, Structured Text](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-to-markdown-converting-documents-into-clean-structured-text)
- [Multi-Column and Complex PDFs: Converting Tricky Layouts Back to Editable Formats](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/multi-column-and-complex-pdfs-converting-tricky-layouts-back-to-editable-formats)
- [Batch Converting PDFs to Editable Formats Without Doing It One File at a Time](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/batch-converting-pdfs-to-editable-formats-without-doing-it-one-file-at-a-time)

### Web, Image & Secure Workflows

- [JPG to PDF: Turning Photos and Scans into Proper Documents](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/jpg-to-pdf-turning-photos-and-scans-into-proper-documents)
- [HTML to PDF: Saving Web Pages as Fixed, Shareable Documents](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/html-to-pdf-saving-web-pages-as-fixed-shareable-documents)
- [How to Sign a PDF: Digital Signatures Explained for Everyone](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/how-to-sign-a-pdf-digital-signatures-explained-for-everyone)
- [Request Signing: Building a Smooth Signature Workflow](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/request-signing-building-a-smooth-signature-workflow)
- [How to Crop a PDF: Trimming Pages for a Clean, Focused Document](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/how-to-crop-a-pdf-trimming-pages-for-a-clean-focused-document)
- [How to Compress a PDF Without Wrecking the Quality](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/how-to-compress-a-pdf-without-wrecking-the-quality)
- [PDF Security: Passwords, Permissions and Protecting Sensitive Documents](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/pdf-security-passwords-permissions-and-protecting-sensitive-documents)
- [Sign a Locked PDF Without Breaking Its Protection](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/sign-a-locked-pdf-without-breaking-its-protection)
- [Images to PDF: Merging a Folder of Pictures into One Clean File](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/images-to-pdf-merging-a-folder-of-pictures-into-one-clean-file)
- [Scan to PDF: Turning Your Phone into a Pocket Document Scanner](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/scan-to-pdf-turning-your-phone-into-a-pocket-document-scanner)
- [PNG to PDF: Saving Screenshots and Graphics as Proper Documents](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/png-to-pdf-saving-screenshots-and-graphics-as-proper-documents)
- [Reduce PDF Size for Email: Beating Attachment Limits the Smart Way](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/reduce-pdf-size-for-email-beating-attachment-limits-the-smart-way)
- [Password Protect PDF: Locking Down Documents That Matter](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/password-protect-pdf-locking-down-documents-that-matter)
- [Redact PDF the Right Way: True Redaction vs the Black Box Trap](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/redact-pdf-the-right-way-true-redaction-vs-the-black-box-trap)
- [Watermark PDF: Branding and Protecting Documents You Share](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/watermark-pdf-branding-and-protecting-documents-you-share)
- [Electronic Signature vs Digital Signature: What Is Legal and What Is Trusted](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/electronic-signature-vs-digital-signature-what-is-legal-and-what-is-trusted)
- [Building a Paperless Signing Workflow for a Small Team](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles/building-a-paperless-signing-workflow-for-a-small-team)

## Key pages

- [Home](https://pdfshuffl.com/): Full PDF toolkit and uploader.
- [All tools](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Browse every PDF conversion and editing tool.
- [Articles](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles): Guides and how-tos for working with PDFs.
- [Playbook](https://pdfshuffl.com/playbook): A guided course on navigating PDFShuffl and how the PDF tools work, with a cheat sheet and a quiz.
- [About](https://pdfshuffl.com/about): What PDFShuffl is and how it works.
- [Contact](https://pdfshuffl.com/contact): Get in touch with the PDFShuffl team.

## Machine-readable data

- [Tool registry (JSON)](https://pdfshuffl.com/api/tools.json): Machine-readable list of all PDFShuffl tools.
- [Sitemap index](https://pdfshuffl.com/sitemap-index.xml): All indexed pages.

_Indexed pages: 550,000 (300,000 PDF keyword pages plus 250,000 geo-targeted pages)._
